name: impact-preview recommends widen for a rule that produces fewer than three total matches per F-6 verdict surface
command: mkdir -p tree && printf 'eval(0)\n' > tree/x.js && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"r","detector":"grep -n eval || true"}]}' > r.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file r.json --root tree --format json 2>out.txt && grep -q '"recommendation":"widen"' out.txt && echo widened 1>&2
